description:
Configure the SMS Server Settings in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus to use a custom HTTP-based SMS provider. Use the following configuration details:

- Gateway URL: https://api.bulksmsgateway.net/v2/send
- HTTP Method: POST
- Parameters:
  - apiKey: f8c3a9d1b7e24056be91dc3a47f6e8a0
  - sender: ADAuditSec
  - to: %mobile%
  - message: %message%

Save the configuration. You are starting from the dashboard logged in as 'admin'.
